title: Training material for RNA sequencing
author: Grüning, Björn
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
RNA-seq  ( RNA sequencing ) uses high-throughput (HTS) data to reveal the presence and quantity of RNA in a biological sample at a given moment in time. 

 RNA-Seq is used to analyze the continually changing cellular transcriptome. Specifically, RNA-Seq facilitates the ability to look at alternative gene spliced transcripts, post-transcriptional modifications, gene fusion, mutations/SNPs and changes in gene expression. [4]  In addition to mRNA transcripts, RNA-Seq can look at different populations of RNA to include total RNA, small RNA, such as miRNA, tRNA, and ribosomal profiling.
steps_raw:
RNA-seq  ( RNA sequencing ) uses high-throughput (HTS) data to reveal the presence and quantity of RNA in a biological sample at a given moment in time. 

 RNA-Seq is used to analyze the continually changing cellular transcriptome. Specifically, RNA-Seq facilitates the ability to look at alternative gene spliced transcripts, post-transcriptional modifications, gene fusion, mutations/SNPs and changes in gene expression. [4]  In addition to mRNA transcripts, RNA-Seq can look at different populations of RNA to include total RNA, small RNA, such as miRNA, tRNA, and ribosomal profiling.
